title: Goldilocks (Discovers the Porridge)
summary: Warm storybook moment - Goldilocks tastes each bowl.
prompt: Goldilocks tiptoed into the cozy little kitchen. On the table sat three steaming bowls of porridge. She tried the first bowl. "This porridge is too hot!" she cried. She tried the second. "This porridge is too cold!" Then she tried the third small bowl. "Ah," she said with a smile, "this porridge is just right." And she ate it all up.
